title: Quark Compat
description: Adds compat between Quark and many mods!
body:
**Description:**

This datapack* adds compatability between many mods and Quark in a variety of ways! Additonally this datapack* works on all versions and loaders of modded minecraft (that have Quark of course).


**Important Notice:**

*Keep in mind this is a datpack and not a resourcepack and can be more complicated to install and play with it is suggested to use a mod such as [Paxi](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/paxi) to make it simple.


**Supported Mods:**

- Habitat
- Galosphere
- Farmers Respite
- Gardens of the Dead
- Undergarden
- Infernal Expansion
- Deep Aether
- More Critters
- Species
- Alexs Caves
- Aether
- L_ender's Cataclysm
